subcodes.first_line: In this day the world is illumined by a new light and gladdened by a new command. In every place a mighty celebration is established, all souls engaged in remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز عالم بنور جدید منور و بامر جدید مسرور در سر کتب جشن عظمی برپا کل بذکر
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @praise and encouragement
